name: California Check Cashing Stores
description_short: In San Jose, CA, California Check Cashing Stores at 1720 W San Carlos St offers check cashing and money services.
description_long:
California Check Cashing Stores is located at 1720 W San Carlos St in San Jose, CA, a convenient standalone location for residents needing quick check cashing services. The store operates in a busy commercial area of San Jose, making it easily accessible for locals and businesses alike. Hours are Monday through Friday 9AM-7PM, Saturday 10AM-4PM, and closed Sundays.

At the 1720 W San Carlos St location in San Jose, you can cash checks, get money orders, pay bills, and access other financial services. The staff can help you with check verification and processing. For service details or to confirm availability, call +1 408-287-0990.

When visiting California Check Cashing Stores at 1720 W San Carlos St in San Jose, bring a valid government ID. This San Jose location is ideal for anyone needing quick check cashing access, bill payment, and money services without a bank account. The store offers reliable service at competitive rates.
address: 1720 W San Carlos St, San Jose, CA 95128

company_info.headquarters: 1720 W San Carlos St, San Jose, CA 95128

pros: Multiple San Francisco locations (at least 3), reducing travel distance for city residents
Extended weekday hours — 9 AM to 7 PM Monday through Friday
Saturday availability (10 AM to 4 PM) for customers who can't visit during the week
Western Union money transfer and money orders available in-store
Online loan application option — can start the process without visiting a branch
Green Dot Visa Debit Cards and reloadable debit cards available for the unbanked
Tax preparation services offered alongside check cashing and loans
cons: Closed Sundays with no exception, limiting access for some customers
Payday loan rates and fees are not disclosed on the website — requires an in-store visit to learn the true cost
Payroll advances capped at $250, which may be insufficient for larger emergency cash needs
The site's own notice acknowledges these products can be expensive when used repeatedly
Services and loan availability explicitly vary by location with no clear listing of which branches offer what
best_for: Unbanked individuals who need to cash checks without a bank account
People needing to send money internationally via Western Union
Residents who need a reloadable prepaid debit card as a banking substitute
Customers who need same-day bill payment or a small payroll advance
diagnosis: California Check Cashing Stores is best suited for unbanked or underbanked San Francisco residents who need to cash checks, send money, or cover a short-term cash gap without a bank account. The main caveat is cost: payday loans and payroll advances are short-term, high-fee products, and the company does not publish its rates — anyone with access to a credit union or bank should exhaust those options first.
services: Payroll Advances (up to $250, in-store and online)
meta_description: California Check Cashing Stores at 1720 W San Carlos St, San Jose, CA. Fast check cashing and money services.
